case_title: BRAIN JARS, INC. VS. MARTIN R. RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-17-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAIN JARS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARTIN R. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $790.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-27-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARTIN R.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRAIN JARS, INC.
